name: Mudra Yojana
description: Loans up to 10 Lakhs for non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises

additional_rules: Must not be defaulter to any bank or financial institution
Should have a satisfactory credit track record

benefit_description: Loan assistance up to ₹10 Lakhs under Tarun category

deep_eligibility_questions.question: Have you ever defaulted on a loan from any bank?
